repo.name: speedtests
repo.description: Network speed test tooling and benchmarks

access_control._description: Optional owner and token for repo automation scripts.

cloudinary._note: Reads from env vars: CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME, CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_PRESET

remote._description: prefer: ssh|https|auto. origin_url: explicit URL. Run .hooks/scripts/set-remote.sh
remote._note: Default ssh so repos created from this template use SSH; matches global url.git@github.com:.insteadOf https://github.com/

identity._description: pre-commit/post-merge/post-checkout: remote URL must match bundled identity-routing.json

em_dash_policy._description: U+2014 em dash is blocked in pre-commit; use hyphen '-' unless explicitly approved

eof_newline_only._description: Silent pre-commit: drops staged changes when file bytes differ from HEAD only by trailing newlines at EOF
